Action: Click on the 'Transaction Code Input Field' dropdown to open the list of available transaction codes.
While holding the Shift key, enter the transaction code /nzvdu into the 'Transaction Code Input Field' in the toolbar to navigate to the specific transaction or function.
Click on the 'Command Input Field' textfield.
Enter the sales organization code 3300 into the "Verkaufsorganisation" (Sales Organization) input field.
Click on the table cell in column "VkOrg" (Sales Organization), row 1, with value 3122.
Press the Enter key to confirm the current input or proceed to the next step.
Enter the customer number 300000 into the "Debitor" field.
Click on the table cell in column "SuchBegr" (Search Term), row 1.
While holding the Shift key, enter the field name BRSCH into the "Feldname" (Field name) input field to specify which data attribute should be updated.
Click on the 'new value' text field.
While holding the Shift key, enter the new value A001 into the 'neuer Wert' (new value) input field to specify the updated data for the selected table and field.
Click on the 'Test Mode (kein Update)' checkbox to enable it.
Click on the 'Checkbox Button' to toggle its state.

Result: The expected outcome of this test is the successful validation of a data change for customer "225272" in test mode without updating the actual database.
